items.title: Мамдани говорит, что Нью-Йорк не может арестовать Нетаньяху за военные преступления, но федеральное правительство должно
items.original_title: Mamdani says New York City can't arrest Netanyahu for war crimes but federal government should
items.rss_summary: New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani said Tuesday that his administration did not have the legal authority to arrest Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu as he had planned, and called on US federal authorities to do so. The Democratic mayor had said earlier this month that he was exploring the legal possibility of executing the arrest warrant issued by the International Criminal Court against the Israeli leader if he were to attend the UN General Assembly in September.
